ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "tournament_date" TEXT /* Date when the tournament took place */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of the tournament (e.g., Daily, Freeroll) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the tournament started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the tournament ended */,
  "buy_in" REAL /* Entry fee for the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the tournament */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players who participated in the tournament */,
  "tournament_status" TEXT /* Current status of the tournament (e.g., Upcoming, In Progress, Finished) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the player registered */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "total_winnings" REAL /* Total winnings of the player across all tournaments */,
  "total_tournaments_played" INTEGER /* Total number of tournaments the player has participated in */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the player's last login */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player's account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament in which the performance was recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose performance is recorded */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Ranking achieved by the player in the tournament */,
  "winnings" REAL /* Amount won by the player in the tournament */,
  "hands" INTEGER /* Number of hands played by the player */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills used by the player */,
  "busts" INTEGER /* Number of busts experienced by the player */,
  "best_hand" TEXT /* Best hand performance of the player in the tournament */,
  "worst_hand" TEXT /* Worst hand performance of the player in the tournament */,
  "hand_avg" REAL /* Average hand performance of the player */,
  "max_chips" REAL /* Maximum chips held by the player during the tournament */,
  "total_chips_start" REAL /* Total chips the player started with in the tournament */,
  "total_chips_end" REAL /* Total chips the player ended with in the tournament */,
  "time_in_game" INTEGER /* Time (in minutes) the player spent in the tournament */,
  "number_of_bets" INTEGER /* Total number of bets made by the player */,
  "number_of_calls" INTEGER /* Total number of calls made by the player */,
  "number_of_folds" INTEGER /* Total number of folds made by the player */,
  "number_of_raises" INTEGER /* Total number of raises made by the player */,
  "average_bet_size" REAL /* Average size of the player's bets */,
  "average_call_size" REAL /* Average size of the player's calls */,
  "average_raise_size" REAL /* Average size of the player's raises */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Status of the player at the end of the tournament (e.g., In Money, Out of Money) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_types" (
  "tournament_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tournament type */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the tournament */,
  "min_players" INTEGER /* Minimum number of players required to start the tournament */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of the tournament */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the tournament (e.g., Daily, Weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hand_statistics" (
  "hand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hand statistic */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance record related to the hand */,
  "hand_type" TEXT /* Type of hand (e.g., Best, Worst) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the hand (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "chips_gained" REAL /* Chips gained or lost during the hand */,
  "hand_number" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the hand in the tournament */,
  "time_played" TEXT /* Time when the hand was played */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player at the table (e.g., Dealer, Small Blind, Big Blind) */,
  "hand_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the hand (e.g., High Card, Pair, Two Pair, etc.) */,
  "opponent_count" INTEGER /* Number of opponents in the hand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hand_statistics_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performance ("performance_id")
)
